parsed.production_notes: The video features a human actor recorded in a real physical environment, while the tablet screen displays an AI-generated animated avatar with a synthetic voice.

characters.appearance: Young adult woman, medium build, fair complexion. She has blonde hair tied back in a ponytail and wears dark-rimmed glasses.
characters.demeanor: Focused on her task, slightly hesitant when speaking, but receptive and positive when corrected.

characters.appearance: Animated female character, fair complexion, wavy red hair.

scenes.setting: A home kitchen during the daytime. Props include a cutting board, knife, apple, and a tablet. The color palette features warm wood tones, yellow walls, and white.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands at a kitchen counter, slicing an apple on a white cutting board with a knife. A tablet is propped up on the counter to her right, displaying Character B. The kitchen features wooden paneled walls and a yellow wall in the background. Natural light illuminates the scene from a nearby window. Character A focuses on cutting the apple, occasionally looking towards the tablet.

scenes.visual_description: A continuous medium shot of a woman in a kitchen cutting an apple while interacting with an AI tutor on a tablet. Dynamic text captions appear on screen, along with red 'X' and green checkmark graphics to indicate incorrect and correct grammar. A banner of US flags is visible at the top of the frame.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: What are you doing?
Character A says: I am cooking my daughter.
Character B says: What? You are cooking your daughter!?
Character A says: No no, I mean I am making food for my daughter!
Character B says: Oh thank god. Then say: I am cooking for my daughter.
Character A says: I am cooking for my daughter.
Character B says: How old is your daughter?
Character A says: She has 3.
Character B says: Say: She is three years old.
Character A says: She is three years old.
Character A says: I have many work today.
Character B says: Do you mean: "I have a lot of work today"?
Character A says: I have a lot of work today.
Character A says: How can I improve my English?
Character B says: By talking to me every day! I'm Skye, an AI tutor on Praktika. I can teach you and correct your English while you're working. 15 minutes daily is all you need!
Character A says: Amazing, let's start!

scenes.visual_description: A static end card featuring a solid purple background. A white brand logo is centered, with two app store download badges positioned below it.
